query: What courses will I take in Computer Engineering?
answer:
Great news — I found quite a bit of information about the Computer Engineering curriculum! Here's what I know...

The Computer Engineering program at Kasetsart University (Bangkhen) covers a strong foundation in both theory and practice. In your first two years, you'll build fundamentals in:
- Mathematics (Calculus, Linear Algebra, Discrete Math)
- Physics and Engineering basics
- Programming fundamentals and data structures
- Digital circuits and computer organization

In Years 3–4, core engineering courses include:
- Algorithm design and analysis
- Operating systems and computer networks
- Database systems
- Software engineering
- Microprocessor and embedded systems
- Electives in AI, computer graphics, and cybersecurity

The program requires 138 credit hours total. [Source: วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์_bangkhen_mko2.pdf]
